ab: miakuza thuini a qali?
en: A: How’s the weather today?

ab: daza wa mashimzaw a qali, mathuaw amiqilha matata wa sazum.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: miakuza thuini a qali?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: daza wa mahnar a qali, mathuaw amiqilha sa sazum.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: miakuza isa saran a qali?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: matata sa tilhaz, a’inanuru ata tu miarain patilhaz.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: miakuza isa saran a qali?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: qalha urum numa tilhaz pakdupan urum.
ch: B:雲很多，太陽被雲遮住了。
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: miakuza simaq a qali?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: uka tilhaz ya simaq, numa qalha urum numa mara’in a fari.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: miakuza izui a qali?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: izai a qali daza wa mashimzaw numa ya musaran a’infazin sa maka’apaw a hulus.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: miakuza ya pangqaiza wa qali?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: pangqaiza wa qali mathuaw maqitan numa makazaka.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: izui a qali amaqusaz qa?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: antu amaqusaz, maqa izui a qali mathuaw maqitan.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: izui a qali amaqusaz qa?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: ua, izui a qali aqmusaz painan.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: qusaziniza thuini qa?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: mukaktuniza qmusaz, mu’apawiza sa tilhaz.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: qusaziniza thuini qa?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: qusaziniza, antu kminathu iaku sa pashikan.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: isaran qusaziniza qa?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: antu qmusaz thuini, ya saqaziza amaqusaz painan, ya musaran amakathu sa pashikan.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: ya mapishkit mashimzawiza wa qali mathuaw amashimzaw qa?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: ua, amashimzaw ya mapishkit a mashimzawiza wa qali, apashinasha sa hulus.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: thuini a kawash mahnariza wa qali mathuaw amahnar qa?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: ua, mahnariza wa qali mathuaw mahnar, mathuaw amiqilha sa sazum.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: kadadu’un uhu ya puhubuqiza wa qali?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: madaduu iaku puhubuqiza wa qali, mathuaw maqalhuuz.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: kadadu’un uhu ya mahaziwhiwiza wa qali?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: ani, antu madaduu iaku mahaziwhiwiza wa qali, maqa mathuaw manasha wa shiraus.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
